automatic_verdict_reason: Claude did not use StructuredOutput, so its claimed approval cannot authorize continuation.

claude_claimed_review.summary: The executor framework implements defense-in-depth security with fail-closed behavior, read-only permissions, SHA pinning, secret detection, bounded scopes, and pre-publish state rechecks. No open P0, P1, or P2 findings were identified.

findings.finding: Secret detection patterns cover common cases but are not exhaustive. Mitigated by the overall defense-in-depth design and manual review requirement.
The total_cost_usd_reported value from Claude wrapper is recorded but correctly documented as untrusted for billing purposes in SECURITY.md.

residual_risk: Repository owner is also administrator and could modify branch protection settings.
Secret patterns may not detect all credential formats.
Claude model behavior within constrained tools is not formally verified.
Local bridge relies on the user having an authentic Claude CLI installed.
